title: Corrigendum 20.10.2017
text: F. No. 296/202/2017-Cx.9 Government of India Ministry of Finance Department of Revenue Central Board of Excise & Customs we Room no. 267 D, North Block, New Delhi, dated 20t October, 2017 CORRIGENDUM To, All Principal Chief/Chief Commissioner of GST & CX, CBEC All Principal Chief/ Chief Commissioner of Customs, CBEC All Directors General, CBEC Webmaster Subject :-Writing off arrears of Central Excise, Service Tax and Customs duty — Constitution of Committees to advise the authority for writing off of arrears - reg. Sir, Sr. Competent Constitution of the Powers delegate | no. Authority Committee ay Chief Committee of three (a) Full Powers for abandonment of Commissioners Chief Commissioners irrecoverable amounts of fines GST, Central | of GST, Central Excise and penalties imposed under Excise & Chief! & Customs or Customs Act, 1962, and Central Commissioners of equivalent rank officers Excise Act, 1944 and Finance Customs Act (Service Tax) Act, 1994. (b) To write off irrecoverable amounts of Customs / Central Excise or Service Tax duties upto Rs. 15 lakhs subject to a report to the Board. 2. Commissioner Committee of three or (a) Full Powers for abandonment of GST, Central | Commissioners of irrecoverable amounts of fines Excise & | GST, Central Excise & and penalties imposed under Commissioner _ of Customs or equivalent Customs Act, 1962, and Central Customs rank officers Excise Act, 1944. Finance Act (Service Tax) Act, 1994. (b) To write off irrecoverable amounts of Customs / Central Excise duties upto Rs. 10 lakh Subject to a report to the (Eee Commissioner. 2. The other contents of the said circular shall remain unchanged. Yours faithfully nections (V. Ganesh Kumar)Under Secretary to the Govern ent of India Tele :- 23092413 -- 1 of 1 --
